caveats: Survivorship bias: universe = currently active 91 stocks (from EDGAR's current ticker list). Companies delisted between 2018-2024 are not in the candidate pool → alpha likely overstated.
PIT market cap (this run): EDGAR EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding × adjclose at rebalance date. Cuts ~half of holdings vs current-mcap baseline.
Sector & institutional holding still use current values (Yahoo doesn't expose historical).
No transaction costs (50 bps typical) or taxes modeled.
Comparison: legacy run (current mcap) yielded alpha +23.03 pp; PIT run yields alpha +4.64 pp. Difference = look-ahead bias quantified.
Sample 91 candidates → TOP 25 = 27% selection rate (not a sharp screen).
